message:
test(P2.12): allowlist precedence under both protocols — 8 scenarios

Verifies user-tier allowlist produces silent allow (exit 0) under both
Codex and Claude:
- Rule-based allowlist (core.git:reset-hard) allows under both protocols
- Exact-command allowlist (git clean -fd) allows under both
- Non-allowlisted commands still blocked under both
- Empty allowlist still blocks
- Cross-protocol parity: same allowlist → same allow behavior

Uses hermetic HOME with DCG_ALLOWLIST_SYSTEM_PATH="" to disable system tier.

All 68 integration tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
